description: Program-memory v3 efficacy and endpoint observations for one harvested program bundle.

required_fields.name: arm_id
required_fields.description: Stable arm identifier within the study.

required_fields.name: endpoint_role
required_fields.description: Endpoint role such as primary or secondary.

required_fields.name: endpoint_domain
required_fields.description: Clinical domain assessed by the endpoint.

required_fields.name: timepoint_label
required_fields.description: Timepoint or visit label for the observation.

required_fields.name: result_summary
required_fields.description: Short normalized summary of the observed result.

required_fields.name: source_document_id
required_fields.description: Source document row anchoring the observation.

optional_fields.name: analysis_population
optional_fields.description: Analysis population used for the observation.

optional_fields.name: effect_size
optional_fields.description: Effect-size value captured as emitted text.
